task_description: Build Phase 3 of J.A.R.V.I.S: Multi-Agent Orchestration with 5 new agents (web_search, data_analyst, scheduler, writer, life_assistant), database layer (MySQL/SQLite), knowledge base with TF-IDF embeddings, protocols (inter-agent communication, task queue), plugin system, and updated orchestrator routing.

verification.summary: All 37 Python files compile without error. Full import chain works. All 8 task classifications route correctly. Database SQLite fallback works. TF-IDF embeddings work. Priority queue works. Plugin loader discovers all 7 agents. Writing tools produce templates. Scheduler tools CRUD works with SQLite.
